caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone held by a shock mount on a boom arm; the text "Audio-Technica AT2020" is legible on the side of the mount. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. As the sequence progresses, the man looks toward the left with an expectant or surprised expression, his mouth slightly open. In the final moments, he brings his right hand up to his face, partially covering his mouth and chin in a gesture that suggests hesitation or a reflexive reaction, while continuing to gaze off-camera.
